allow: Bash(python -c "from app.config import settings; print\(f'DATABASE_URL={settings.DATABASE_URL}'\); print\(f'JWT_ALGORITHM={settings.JWT_ALGORITHM}'\); print\(f'FastAPI title={__import__\(\\"app.main\\", fromlist=[\\"app\\"]\).app.title}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\('New Form:', '新建比赛' in html, 'len:', len\(html\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('app/main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('main.py: syntax OK'\)")
